commit_scope: Add influence teaching translator shards that connect major formative works and presences to lesson atoms, frequency translations, desired network shape, trace refs, attribution recipients, and current organism influence CC.

commands: python3 scripts/influence_teaching_translator.py --slug urs-field-story --limit 5 | jq '{policy_id, totals, rows: [.rows[] | {name,current_cc,frequency_translation,network_shape: .network_shape[0:2]}]}'
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py tests/test_field_story_agent_surface.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/services/influence_teaching_translator_service.py app/routers/field_stories.py app/services/field_story_mcp_tools.py tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py
local_validation.summary: JSON shape, py_compile, focused API/MCP test, CLI readback, related field story tests, ruff, maintainability audit, diff whitespace validation, direct runtime verifier, aggregate PR guard, and follow-through check pass. The first aggregate guard saw a runtime verifier miss; the direct verifier and guard rerun passed.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub check monitoring.

deploy_validation.details: Pending merge to main and public deploy verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Humans and agents can now ask how major influences translate into lessons, frequencies, desired network shape, and attribution using API, MCP, CLI, or artifact reads without loading raw source bodies.
test_flows: Artifact flow registers trace-influence-teaching-translator in the field story manifest.
API flow returns Frontiers Saga, Spellmonger Universe, and Sword of Truth lesson/frequency/network-shape rows joined to current CC.
MCP flow exposes get_influence_teaching_translator through TOOL_MAP.
CLI flow returns the same policy id, row totals, current CC, and frequency translations.

phase_gate.reason: Local implementation validation and pre-commit gates are complete; push, PR CI, and public deploy validation remain.
